1 System Overview

Tesseract is an enterprise-grade Treasury Document Intelligence Platform designed to ingest, extract, store, and query complex financial documents: BAI2/EDI bank files, PDF bond statements, CSV/Excel treasury reports, and real-time intraday Kafka feeds. It exposes a conversational chatbot interface powered by an NL2SQL engine and a hybrid RAG pipeline backed by a 72B parameter LLM.

💡
Primary Goal: Enable treasury analysts to ask natural-language questions about their portfolio — “What is our DV01 exposure on USD bonds maturing in Q4?” — and receive accurate, verifiable answers with cited sources and rendered charts, within a 15-second SLA.
15s
SLA Ceiling
72B
LLM Params (FP8)
6
Architectural Planes
3
Query Routing Paths
BGE-M3
Embedding Model
Qdrant
Vector DB

Supported Document Types

FormatSourceProcessing LaneNotes
BAI2 / EDIBank file exportsStructured (BAI2 Parser)Type codes, account codes, transaction records
PDF / ScannedBond statements, custodian reportsUnstructured (OCR + NER)Tesseract + YOLOX layout detection + LayoutLMv3
CSV / ExcelTreasury position reportsStructured (parser)Tabular; validated via Pydantic schema
Kafka streamIntraday bank balance feedStreaming (aiokafka async)Real-time upsert into PostgreSQL

2 System Architecture

Tesseract follows a six-plane horizontal architecture where each plane has a well-defined responsibility and communicates with adjacent planes through typed interfaces. This layered decomposition ensures each concern can be scaled, replaced, or upgraded independently.

Planes Summary

📥

Ingestion Plane

Classifies incoming documents, routes to the appropriate parser (BAI2 or OCR), consumes Kafka intraday stream.

⚙️

Processing Plane

Vendor entity resolution, bond metric calculation (YTM, DV01, Duration), schema validation via Pydantic.

🗄️

Storage Plane

PostgreSQL 16 for structured data, Qdrant for vector embeddings, Redis for L1/L2 cache, S3 for raw blobs.

🔍

Query Plane

Intent-based routing to NL2SQL engine (Coder-7B), hybrid BM25+BGE-M3 retriever, or bond calculator.

🤖

Generation Plane

Context assembly, vLLM gateway (Qwen2.5-72B FP8 + EAGLE speculative decoding), numerical verifier, Plotly chart service.

🌐

API Plane

FastAPI REST + WebSocket, Keycloak OIDC authentication, React chatbot UI with streaming response.

3 Component Details

3.1 Ingestion Plane

ComponentTechnologyResponsibility
Document ClassifierML modelDetects file type and content category; routes to structured or unstructured lane
BAI2 / EDI ParserPythonParses BAI2 type codes, account identifiers, transaction records; handles group/account/transaction hierarchy
Kafka ConsumeraiokafkaAsync consumer for intraday bank balance feed; at-least-once delivery with offset tracking
OCR EngineTesseract + YOLOXPage layout detection (YOLOX), text extraction (Tesseract); handles tables, multi-column PDFs
NER ExtractorLayoutLMv3Named-entity recognition on OCR output; extracts bond ISIN, amount, maturity date, counterparty
Celery WorkersCelery + Redis brokerBatch processing workers for uploaded documents; configurable concurrency, priority queues

3.2 Processing Plane

ComponentTechnologyResponsibility
Vendor Entity ResolverrapidfuzzNormalises counterparty names from transaction descriptions using fuzzy matching against a curated entity registry
Bond Calculatorscipy / numpyComputes YTM, modified duration, DV01, convexity from face value, coupon, and maturity fields
Pydantic ValidatorPydantic v2Enforces schema contracts for BAI2Transaction and BondEntity models before storage writes

3.3 Storage Plane

StoreTechnologyWhat is StoredAccess Pattern
Relational DBPostgreSQL 16bank_accounts, account_balances, transactions, bonds, bond_positions, materialized viewsPrimary write & NL2SQL read target; indexed by account_id, date, currency
Vector StoreQdrantBGE-M3 embeddings of document chunks and transaction descriptionsHybrid dense + sparse (BM25) ANN search; RRF fusion re-ranking
CacheRedisNL2SQL query results keyed by query hash; cache TTL = 300 sL1 (in-process) + L2 (Redis); invalidated on PG upsert
Blob StoreAWS S3Raw ingested files (BAI2, PDF, CSV); kept for audit and re-processingWrite-once; presigned URL for download; lifecycle rule → Glacier after 90 d

3.4 Query Plane

70%
NL2SQL Engine
Qwen2.5-Coder-7B generates parameterised SQL from natural language. 30 SQL templates cover common treasury patterns. Safety validator blocks destructive statements.
20%
Hybrid RAG Retriever
BGE-M3 dense + BM25 sparse search on Qdrant. Top-20 candidates → CrossEncoder re-ranker → top-6 chunks assembled into context.
10%
Bond Calculator
Pure Python calculation path for analytical queries (YTM, DV01, duration). Fetches positions from PostgreSQL; runs scipy routines; bypasses LLM generation.

3.5 Generation Plane

ComponentTechnologyDetail
Context BuilderPythonAssembles structured prompt from SQL rows / RAG chunks / bond metrics; enforces max-token budget
vLLM GatewayQwen2.5-72B FP8 + EAGLESpeculative decoding (EAGLE draft model), FP8 quantization, prefix caching, temp=0.0 for determinism
Numerical VerifierPythonCross-checks every numeric figure in LLM JSON against PostgreSQL ground truth; rejects response on mismatch
Chart ServicePlotlyRenders requested chart types (bar, line, scatter, pie) as PNG base64; attached to ChatResponse

3.6 API Plane

ComponentTechnologyDetail
FastAPIPython 3.11 + uvicornREST endpoints + WebSocket for streaming; Pydantic request/response models; async throughout
AuthKeycloak OIDCJWT verification on every request; scopes control portfolio access; refresh token rotation
React UIReact + ViteChatbot interface; WebSocket streaming display; chart rendering; portfolio selector

4 Ingestion Pipeline

The ingestion layer operates two concurrent lanes depending on document type. Both converge at the Pydantic validator before writing to storage.

Structured Lane (BAI2 / CSV / EDI)

Document Classifier

Detects BAI2 header pattern (01, record type) or CSV column schema. Enqueues to structured_lane Celery queue.

BAI2 Parser

Parses group (02), account (03), transaction (16), and continuation (88) records. Resolves BAI2 type codes to transaction category labels.

Vendor Entity Resolver

Extracts counterparty name from transaction text field. Fuzzy-matches against vendor_registry table using rapidfuzz.token_sort_ratio with threshold ≥ 80.

Pydantic Validator → PostgreSQL

Validates against BAI2Transaction model. Upserts to transactions and account_balances tables. Triggers REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY.

Unstructured Lane (PDF / Scanned Image)

OCR Engine (Tesseract + YOLOX)

YOLOX detects page layout regions (table, header, body). Tesseract v5 (LSTM engine) extracts text per region. unstructured library handles multi-column PDFs.

NER Extractor (LayoutLMv3)

Token classification on OCR text + bounding box features. Labels: ISIN, AMOUNT, MATURITY_DATE, COUPON, COUNTERPARTY, CURRENCY.

Bond Calculator (scipy / numpy)

Given face value, coupon rate, maturity, and current price: computes YTM (Newton-Raphson), Modified Duration, DV01 (duration x price / 10,000), Convexity.

Pydantic Validator → PostgreSQL + Qdrant

Validates against BondEntity model. Upserts to bonds and bond_positions. BGE-M3 embeds document chunk and indexes into Qdrant treasury_docs collection.

⚠️
Cache invalidation: Every PostgreSQL upsert publishes a cache-invalidation event to Redis via PUBLISH. The FastAPI layer subscribes and evicts affected query hashes from L2 cache immediately.

5 Query & Response Flow

Every chatbot query passes through a Query Router that classifies intent and extracts entities before dispatching to one of three paths.

5.1 Query Router

IntentSignal KeywordsPathFrequency
NL2SQLtotal, balance, sum, count, between dates, list allNL2SQL Engine~70%
RAGexplain, what is, describe, what does, per the documentHybrid Retriever~20%
BOND_CALCYTM, DV01, duration, convexity, yieldBond Calculator~10%

5.2 NL2SQL Path

✅
Cache-first: a SHA-256 hash of the normalised query string is checked in Redis before any LLM call. A cache hit returns in < 5ms.
Redis Cache Lookup

Key: nl2sql:{SHA256(normalised_query)}. HIT return immediately. MISS proceed.

SQL Generation (Coder-7B)

System prompt includes full PostgreSQL schema (JSON-schema format) + 30 few-shot examples. Output: parameterised SQL string.

Safety Validation

AST-parses generated SQL using sqlglot. Rejects: DROP, DELETE, UPDATE, CTEs with writes, subquery depth > 3.

PostgreSQL Execution

Parameterised query via asyncpg. Timeout: 10s. Row limit: 10,000.

Cache Write

Result rows cached under query hash, TTL = 300s.

5.3 RAG Path

BGE-M3 Embedding

Query encoded as 1024-dim dense vector using FlagEmbedding BGE-M3 model (multilingual, finance fine-tuned).

Qdrant Hybrid Search

Simultaneously: dense ANN search (HNSW, ef=128) + sparse BM25 search. Results fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF). Top-20 candidates returned.

CrossEncoder Re-Ranking

cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L6-v2 re-scores all 20 candidates against the query. Top-6 chunks selected for context.

5.4 Generation & Verification

system:  You are a treasury analyst assistant. Answer ONLY from the provided context.
         Always return JSON with keys: answer (str), figures (array), chart_requested (bool)
context: [sql_rows | rag_chunks | bond_metrics]
user:    {user query}

The Numerical Verifier checks every figures[].value against a direct PostgreSQL lookup. If any figure deviates by more than 0.01%, the response is rejected and a fallback message is returned.

6 Latency Budget

The platform targets a P95 end-to-end latency of ≤ 15 seconds. The dominant cost is the 72B LLM generation step; all upstream stages are optimised to leave the majority of the budget available for the model.

StageP50 (ms)P95 (ms)Path
Auth + JWT verify3060All
Redis cache check25NL2SQL
NL2SQL generation (Coder-7B)7001,200NL2SQL
SQL execution (PostgreSQL)2050NL2SQL
BGE-M3 embedding6085RAG
Qdrant hybrid search130200RAG
CrossEncoder re-rank250400RAG
Bond Calculator100160Bond Calc
Context assembly3050All
vLLM generation (72B FP8 EAGLE)6,00011,000All
Numerical verification5090All
Chart render (Plotly)150200If requested
📊
NL2SQL happy path (cache HIT): Auth (30ms) + Redis (2ms) + context (30ms) + vLLM (6,000ms) + verify (50ms) = ~6.1s P50, well within SLA.

RAG worst case (P95): Auth (60ms) + embed (85ms) + search (200ms) + re-rank (400ms) + context (50ms) + vLLM (11,000ms) + verify (90ms) + chart (200ms) = ~12.1s, under 15s SLA.

7 Data Flow & Storage Schema

PostgreSQL Schema (Key Tables)

TablePrimary KeyKey ColumnsNotes
bank_accountsaccount_idbank_code, currency, account_typeMaster account registry from BAI2 Group header
account_balances(account_id, date)opening_bal, closing_bal, available_balDaily snapshot; upsert on conflict
transactionstxn_id (UUID)account_id, date, amount, bai2_type, vendor_idIndexed on (account_id, date); partitioned by month
bondsisinissuer, face_value, coupon, maturity, currencyMaster bond register extracted from PDFs
bond_positions(portfolio_id, isin, date)quantity, market_price, ytm, dv01, durationPre-computed metrics updated on each PDF ingest
daily_account_summary(account_id, date)txn_count, net_flow, closing_balMaterialized view; refreshed concurrently on each ingest
portfolio_summary(portfolio_id, date)total_dv01, total_duration, market_valueMaterialized view; refreshed on bond_positions upsert

Qdrant Collection: treasury_docs

FieldTypeDetail
idUUIDChunk ID (document_id + chunk_index)
vectorfloat[1024]BGE-M3 dense embedding
sparse_vectorBM25TF-IDF sparse encoding for keyword recall
payload.doc_idstringSource document S3 key
payload.doc_typeenumpdf_statement | bai2_txn | csv_report
payload.portfolio_idstringUsed for filtered ANN search per portfolio
payload.chunk_textstringRaw text for context assembly
payload.page_numintSource page number (for citation)

8 API Reference

Ingestion Endpoints

MethodEndpointDescription
POST/v1/ingest/documentUpload BAI2, PDF, CSV; returns doc_id and status: queued
GET/v1/ingest/status/{doc_id}Poll ingestion status: queued | processing | done | failed
GET/v1/ingest/jobsList recent ingestion jobs with status and doc metadata

Chat Endpoints

MethodEndpointDescription
POST/v1/chatSubmit query; returns ChatResponse (answer, figures, chart_b64, sources)
WS/ws/chatWebSocket for streaming token-by-token response
GET/v1/chat/historyRetrieve conversation history for current session

Chat Request / Response Schema

// POST /v1/chat
Request:
{
  "query": "What is our net USD cash position as of yesterday?",
  "portfolio_id": "port_ACME_001",
  "session_id": "sess_abc123",
  "chart": true
}

Response:
{
  "answer": "Your net USD cash position as of 2026-06-15 is $142.3M ...",
  "figures": [{"label": "Net USD Cash", "value": 142300000, "source": "daily_account_summary"}],
  "chart_b64": "iVBORw0KGgo...",
  "sources": [{"doc_id": "bai2_2026-06-15.txt", "page": null, "score": 0.94}],
  "routing_path": "NL2SQL",
  "latency_ms": 7820
}

Portfolio / Data Endpoints

MethodEndpointDescription
GET/v1/portfolio/{id}/positionsList bond positions with pre-computed metrics
GET/v1/portfolio/{id}/summaryAggregated DV01, duration, market value from materialized view
GET/v1/accounts/{id}/transactionsPaginated transaction list; filters: date range, bai2_type, amount range

9 Security

🔐

Authentication

Keycloak OIDC. All APIs require Authorization: Bearer <JWT>. Tokens expire in 1h; refresh token rotation with 7d sliding window.

🛡️

Authorisation

Portfolio-scoped access. JWT claims include allowed_portfolios[]. Query Router injects portfolio filter on all SQL and Qdrant searches.

💉

SQL Injection Prevention

All NL2SQL output is AST-validated by sqlglot. Queries executed as parameterised statements via asyncpg. No string interpolation into SQL.

🔒

Data at Rest

PostgreSQL TDE. S3 SSE-KMS. Redis AUTH + TLS. Qdrant mTLS between services.

🌐

Network

All inter-service traffic on private VPC. Only FastAPI + React UI exposed via ALB. Ingress restricted to corporate IP range via security group.

📋

Audit Logging

Every query (user, timestamp, routing_path, latency, portfolio_id) logged to CloudWatch. Ingestion events include doc_id and processing outcome.

CategoryTechnologyVersion / Notes
API FrameworkFastAPIPython 3.11 + uvicorn, async
Task QueueCelery + RedisPriority queues; beat for scheduled re-indexing
StreamingaiokafkaConsumer group for intraday balances

Document LoadingunstructuredMulti-format; handles multi-column PDFs

LLM ServingvLLMPrefix caching, paged attention, tensor parallel
SQL ParsersqlglotAST-based SQL safety validation
Bond Mathscipy + numpyNewton-Raphson YTM solver
Entity MatchingrapidfuzzToken sort ratio; threshold ≥ 80
Relational DBPostgreSQL 16asyncpg driver; monthly partitioning on transactions
Vector DBQdrantHNSW index; hybrid dense+sparse search
CacheRedis 7L2 query cache + Celery broker + Pub/Sub invalidation
Blob StoreAWS S3SSE-KMS; Glacier lifecycle after 90d
AuthKeycloakOIDC + JWT; portfolio-scoped claims
ChartingPlotlyServer-side PNG rendering; returned as base64
FrontendReact + ViteChatbot interface; WebSocket streaming; Tailwind CSS
Schema ValidationPydantic v2BAI2Transaction + BondEntity models
InfrastructureAWS EKSGPU node group for vLLM; HPA on FastAPI pods
